original_image_tags: A large, faded red outline stamp of the word "COPY" is centered over the bottom paragraph of the typed text.

elements.description: A typed document page with the title 'SOME LIFE DATA ON KENNETH ARNOLD'. The page contains several paragraphs of biographical text. A red stamp reading 'COPY' is visible at the bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content—a red 'COPY' stamp—and its approximate location, though A specifies it is an outline stamp over a paragraph while B notes it is at the bottom.
